Localization.Description: A user added, renamed, or removed a signature category

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} removed the signature category "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} renamed the signature category "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} added the signature category "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
